name: Rear Ends
description: Frankenstein Trikes rear end assemblies are built around 9" Ford Street/Strip axles and engineered for a wide range of stock Harley-Davidson rear tire sizes. They are organized into four series based on tire capacity: the Standard Series for stock rear tires up to 170 (sprocket/pulley mounting surface 3 1/4" from center); the 200 Series for tires up to 200 (mounting surface 4 1/4" from center); the 250 Series for tires up to 250 (mounting surface 5 1/4" from center); and the 300 Series for tires up to 300 (mounting surface 6 1/4" from center). Each rear end is offered in a variety of widths (30", 32", 34", 36", 38", 40", 42") to match the trike kit and wheel/tire package, and all use sealed bearings, a 5 on 4.5" bolt pattern, and 1/2"-20 threaded studs. Hot Rod and Sport versions feature 6061 T6 billet aluminum center sections, with optional billet 4-piston calipers and stainless steel rotors available for outboard brake configurations.
specs: Standard Series: stock rear tires up to 170
200 Series: stock rear tires up to 200
250 Series: stock rear tires up to 250
300 Series: stock rear tires up to 300

name: Swing Arms
description: Frankenstein Trikes swing arms are purpose-built replacements for a wide variety of Harley-Davidson platforms, including Sportster '04 & up, Sportster '57-'03, Dyna Glide '06-'17, Dyna Glide '90-'05, Softail (multiple year ranges), Softail Rocker and Breakout, FLT/FLH & Road King, V-ROD '02-'17, FXR, FL & FX 4 Speed, and Street '14 & up. All swing arms are constructed from steel and powder coated matte black, and are compatible with Frankenstein rear end widths ranging from 30" to 42" depending on the model. Rear End Mounting Plates are also offered to tie the swing arm to the rear end assembly. A core charge applies to certain models and is refunded upon receipt and inspection of the returned stock swing arm; chrome swing arms will not be accepted, and core returns must be stock Harley-Davidson units for the correct year and model that the kit was purchased for.
specs: Fits 30", 34", 38", 40", and 42" rear ends depending on model
Core charge refunded upon receipt and inspection
Chrome swing arms not accepted as cores

name: Triple Trees
description: Frankenstein Trikes Raked Triple Trees (POWER STEER) are designed to make your trike easy to steer and are also suitable for motorcycles with sidecars. Each set is CNC-machined to the highest standard from 6061 T6 billet aluminum and is offered in both polished and machine finishes. A wide catalog of fitments is available, including Sportster (2011+ Custom, 1988+, Super-Low, Forty-Eight), Dyna (standard, Wide Glide, Fat Bob), Softail (standard and Fat Boy & Heritage), FXR, FLT/FLH Road King, and V-Rod (standard and Muscle). Rake angles range from 3 degrees through 8 degrees, with offset measurements from 39mm through 55mm so that geometry can be matched to the specific bike and trike kit. These triple trees are made in Pleasanton, KS USA and are not intended for use on stock two-wheel motorcycles.
specs: Available in polished and machine finish
Rake angles from 3 degrees through 8 degrees
Designed for trikes and motorcycles with sidecars
Not intended for stock two-wheel motorcycles

name: Wheels & Tires
description: Frankenstein Trikes offers a curated selection of wheels and tires packaged specifically for its trike conversion kits. The standard offering is the 15" x 8" ION Style 171 wheel, available in either polished (171-5865P) or matte black (171-5865MB) finish, paired with either General Altimax 215/60-15 tires or Hankook 265/50-15 tires. Every package ships as a set of two, mounted and balanced, with center caps, lug nuts, and valve stems included. Wheels use a 5 on 4 1/2" bolt pattern with 3 1/4" back spacing to fit the Frankenstein rear end and fender bracket geometry. Raised white letter tires can be mounted with the lettering facing inside or outside at the customer's preference. Customers considering custom wheel and tire combinations are directed to the site's measurement guide to confirm fender bracket compatibility.
specs: Available in Polished (171-5865P) or Matte Black (171-5865MB)
Center caps, lug nuts, and valve stems included
Tire options: General Altimax 215/60-15 or Hankook 265/50-15
Raised white letters can be mounted inside or outside

name: Fenders & Brackets
description: Frankenstein Trikes fenders are made from fiberglass and finished with a gray primer gel coat, pre-trimmed and drilled for fitment on the trike kit. Before installation, each fender should be washed with soap and water to eliminate any mold releasing agent residue; after mounting, alignment should be verified and the fender trimmed to specification as needed prior to paint and bodywork. Three styles are offered: 11" short, 11" long in the FL style, and a 12 3/4" round fender. Fender brackets are made from steel and powder coated matte black, and are available in either one-piece or two-piece configurations to match the chosen fender. Custom wheel and tire combinations may require special order brackets supplied without powder coating so they can be modified and finished to suit the build. Pricing runs approximately $500-$1,100 with continental US shipping in the $55-$120 range.
specs: Fenders made from fiberglass with gray primer gel coat
Fender sizes: 11" short, 11" long (FL style), 12 3/4" round
Brackets made from steel, powder coated matte black
Special order brackets available without powder coating for custom builds

name: Exhaust
description: Frankenstein Trikes offers model-specific exhaust systems engineered to clear the trike rear end, swing arm, and fender bracketry on converted Harley-Davidson platforms. Fitments include Sportster Exhaust, Dyna Exhaust, Softail Exhaust, Softail Fat Boy & Heritage Exhaust, and FL/FLH Road King Exhaust. Each system is designed as part of the complete Frankenstein trike conversion and is sold alongside the other components (rear ends, swing arms, wheels, brakes, and accessories) offered on the site. Detailed per-model specifications and pricing are provided on the individual category pages linked from this overview.

name: Trailer Hitch
description: The Frankenstein Trike's Trailer Hitch connects easily to the star plates on the Frankenstein rear end and accepts a standard 3/4" shank. It is made from steel, powder coated matte black, and ships with grade 8 bolts for installation. The hitch is compatible with most Harley-Davidson models equipped with short stock rear fenders, but is not compatible with Fat Boy, Heritage, Deluxe, or FLT/FLH touring models. Pricing is $250.00 plus $30.00 shipping.
specs: Not compatible with Fat Boy, Heritage, Deluxe, or FLT/FLH touring models

name: Parking Brake
description: The Frankenstein Trike's Parking Brake is a complete kit in which the caliper attaches to the rear end while the parking brake handle mounts to the fender bracket. The kit includes the caliper, parking brake handle, mounting brackets, cable, and all necessary hardware, so installation can be completed with the supplied parts. It is compatible with both the standard Frankenstein Trikes rear end and the Frankenstein Old School rear end. Pricing is $270.00 plus $35.00 shipping.
specs: Compatible with Frankenstein Trikes rear end
Compatible with Frankenstein Old School rear end
Includes mounting brackets, cable, and hardware
Caliper attaches to rear end; handle mounts to fender bracket

name: Luggage Rack
description: The Frankenstein Trike's Luggage Rack connects easily to the rear fender struts of your bike. It is made from steel, powder coated matte black, and includes bolts for installation. The standard version fits Harley-Davidson Sportster, Harley Street, and Yamaha Bolt models, while the Two Up luggage rack is offered for Harley-Davidson Sportster and 2018 Harley-Davidson Softail Low Rider models. Both versions are priced at $180.00 plus $45.00 shipping.
specs: Standard model fits Sportster, Harley Street, and Yamaha Bolt
Two Up model fits Sportster and 2018 Softail Low Rider

name: Outboard Brakes
description: The Frankenstein Outboard Brakes Complete Kit is a full brake system for the trike rear end, consisting of two rotors and rotor hats, one four-piston Hawg Halters caliper, two axle retainer/caliper brackets, brake lines with fittings, and ten longer axle studs. It is priced at $670.00 plus $45.00 shipping for customer installation, with an additional $600.00 for factory installation. Individual service parts are also sold separately: replacement Brake Pads for the four-piston Hawg Halters caliper at $39.00 per set plus $12.00 shipping; a Brake Rotor that fits 2000-and-newer Harley-Davidson motorcycles, matching Harley part number 41797-00, at $80.00 plus $24.00 shipping; and the four-piston Hawg Halters Caliper assembly at $325.00 plus $24.00 shipping, which includes brake pads, banjo bolt, and crush washers.
specs: Caliper kit includes pads, banjo bolt, and crush washers

name: T-Shirts
description: Frankenstein Trikes branded apparel includes the Frankenstein Trikes 20th Anniversary Men's T-Shirt, the standard Frankenstein Trikes Men's T-Shirt, the Frankenstein Trikes Women's V-Neck T-Shirt, the Motorcycle Works 30th Anniversary Men's T-Shirt, and the Motorcycle Works Men's T-Shirt. The 20th Anniversary and Motorcycle Works 30th Anniversary designs commemorate company milestones, and the standard Frankenstein Trikes tees feature front and back graphics. All shirts are priced at $20.00 plus S/H, with sizing that varies by style: standard men's and women's styles are offered in Small through 3XL, while the 20th Anniversary shirt is only available in Large, XL, 2XL, and 3XL.
specs: Men's sizes: Small, Medium, Large, XL, 2XL, 3XL (varies by style)
Women's sizes: Small, Medium, Large, XL, 2XL, 3XL

name: Patches
description: Frankenstein Trikes offers two embroidered patches for jackets and vests. The Frankenstein Trikes Large Patch is shown on the back of a jacket and is priced at $30.00. The Frankenstein Trikes Small Patch is shown on the front of a jacket and is priced at $7.00. Both patches feature the Frankenstein Trikes branding and are available directly from the company's website.
specs: Large Patch - $30.00 (shown on back of jacket)
Small Patch - $7.00 (shown on front of jacket)
